name: Kara Zor-El | Supergirl
description:
"Krypton was a beautiful place. We are people of hope, not war."

The Last Daughter of Krypton. From the Flash (2023), Kara Zor-El was sent to Earth to protect her cousin, Kal-El. After being freed from prison, she now seeks to find her new purpose on Earth after being unable to find Kal-El.

Art by u/A-I-E-K: https://www.reddit.com/r/DC_Cinematic/comments/okvnz1/fanart_sasha_calle_supergirl_the_flash_concept/
creator: TalkEase
